channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jaden Ivey injury update: Detroit Pistons guard clears another hurdle ahead of playoffs
item.description: The Detroit Pistons updated the injury status of guard Jaden Ivey just days before the start of the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: A Masters' moment: Patton Kizzire crawls through shrubbery on hands and knees to find his golf ball
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Patton Kizzire provided the first viral moment of the 2025 Masters when his errant tee shot on the fifth hole sailed right of the fairway, prompting the American to crawl through the shrubbery in an effort to find his ball and attempt to save par.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mbappé's legal team says he has seized 55 million euros from PSG’s accounts in their legal dispute
item.description: PARIS (AP) — Kylian Mbappé’s legal team is going on the attack with multiple lawsuits to try and resolve the legal dispute between the World Cup winner and his former club Paris Saint-Germain.
item.dc:creator: SAMUEL PETREQUIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: John Cena opens up about skin cancer removal ahead of WrestleMania 41
item.description: WWE legend John Cena opened up about having a cancerous spot removed from his body after a check up with the dermatologist, and now he is advocating for using sunscreen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blues' Jordan Binnington gets into scrap with Oilers' Corey Perry early in crucial game
item.description: Edmonton Oilers winger Corey Perry and St. Louis Blues goaltender Jordan Binnington mixed it up early in the first period of their crucial matchp.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eriksson Ek, Kaprizov return to lead the Wild past the Sharks, 8-7 in overtime
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Joel Eriksson Ek scored a career-high four goals in his return from a lower-body injury, Kirill Kaprizov had his second of the game in overtime in his first game back and the Minnesota Wild outlasted the San Jose Sharks 8-7 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jokic has 32nd triple-double to lead Nuggets past Kings 124-116 in Denver's 1st game without Malone
item.description: SACRAMENTO (AP) — Nikola Jokic had his 32nd triple-double of the season with 20 points, 12 rebounds and 11 assists and Denver beat the Sacramento Kings 124-116 on Wednesday night in the Nuggets' first game since head coach Michael Malone was fired.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL WAGAMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kvaratskhelia's wonder goal helps PSG beat Aston Villa 3-1 in 1st leg of CL quarterfinals
item.description: PARIS (AP) — A wonder goal from Khvicha Kvaratskhelia upstaged a brilliant curling shot from teammate Désiré Doué as Paris Saint-Germain beat Aston Villa 3-1 in the first leg of the Champions League quarterfinals on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JEROME PUGMIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL exec calls Shedeur Sanders 'fringe starter,' wary of pro upside: report
item.description: One NFC personnel executive referred to Shedeur Sanders as a 'fringe starter' despite being a consensus first-round pick in the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Olympic golf to get a mixed-team event for the 2028 Los Angeles Games
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Mixed teams are coming to golf at the Los Angeles Olympics. The International Olympic Committee made it official Wednesday when it released the official program for the 2028 Games, in which female athletes are expected to have a slight majority for the first time.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Female athletes to be in the majority at 2028 Los Angeles Olympics after big win for women's soccer
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — Female athletes will be in the majority at an Olympics for the first time at the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games thanks to a big win for women’s soccer.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah scores season-high 7 goals in win over Seattle
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Whether or not they make the NHL playoffs, the Utah Hockey Club is out to finish the season with a bang.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Retzlaff poised for another big year at BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last season, BYU quarterback Jake Retzlaff threw for almost 3,000 yards, 20 touchdowns, while rushing for over 400 yards and six TD's as the Cougars shocked everyone with an 11-2 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: (KTLA) -- President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Mikheyev, Nazar and Knight lead the Blackhawks to a 3-1 win over the Penguins
item.description: Ilya Mikheyev scored twice, Frank Nazar added a goal and Spencer Knight stopped 28 shots as the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game skid with a 3-1 win over the Pittsburgh Penguins on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Geese make nest next to Wrigley Field bleachers during Cubs games
item.description: One goose appeared to be sitting on the nest a couple of hours before first pitch but took off flying with its mate.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Carpenter and Torkelson homer as Tigers beat White Sox 7-2 and drop Chicago to 2-6
item.description: Kerry Carpenter homered for the third time in two games and Spencer Torkelson had a home run and a double Saturday as the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-2 for their fourth win in five games following an opening three-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Fox 5

item.title: Capitals beat Blackhawks 5-3, Ovechkin scores two goals to tie Gretzky
item.description: Alex Ovechkin tied Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record by scoring the 893rd and 894th of his career, the second being the game winner, as the Washington Capitals rallied to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Teams battle it out in NCAA Women's Final Four
item.description: The South Carolina Gamecocks are headed back to the NCAA Championship game to fight for their second straight national title.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Keanu Tanuvasa, Carsen Ryan go from Utah to BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last year at this time, Keanu Tanuvasa and Carsen Ryan were both gearing up for Utah's first season in the Big 12 Conference. Now, they're getting ready for Utah's biggest rival.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pacers run over Jazz in fourth quarter in 140-112 win
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz hung with the Indiana Pacers for three quarters, trailing by just four points going into the fourth. But Indiana outscored Utah in the final quarter, 42-18 en route to a 140-112 win. The Jazz have lost eight in a row and 18 of its last 19 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Carpenter homers twice, Flaherty wins in Detroit return, Tigers beat White Sox 7-4 in home opener
item.description: Kerry Carpenter hit a pair of solo home runs and the Detroit Tigers beat the Chicago White Sox 7-4 Friday for their 14th win in their last 17 home openers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Fencer refuses to compete against transgender opponent
item.description: Turner told NewsNation she didn’t “want to let people know that I'm OK with this and pretend like nothing's happening.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation
